series_metadata.series_description: Materials related to the submission of the OCSE-34A (Part 1) Quarterly Report of Collections; OCSE 34-A (Part 2) Itemized Undistributed Collections used to track services under the Child Support program. This report is completed and filed quarterly as a preliminary report with revisions possible within the quarter filed.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office and 3 years in records center ; Electronic: superseded, obsolete, or replaced
